MATS.name: Clinker (cement)
MATS.note: Cement clinker — hard angular, Very abrasive

MATS.name: Sulphur crushed
MATS.note: Crushed sulphur — free flowing, low temp limit

MATS.name: Alumina calcined
MATS.note: Calcined alumina — very abrasive fine powder

MATS.name: Chrome ore
MATS.note: Chrome ore — very dense, highly abrasive

MATS.name: Manganese ore
MATS.note: Manganese ore — very dense and abrasive

MATS.name: Vermiculite expanded
MATS.note: Expanded vermiculite — very light insulation aggregate

MATS.name: Zinc concentrate
MATS.note: Zinc sulphide concentrate — dense, cohesive when wet

BEARINGS.name: SY20TF
BEARINGS.note: 20 mm bore; set-screw lock; feeder/dosing applications

BEARINGS.name: SY30TF
BEARINGS.note: 30 mm — light screw feeders & short conveyors

BEARINGS.name: SY40TF
BEARINGS.note: 40 mm — standard small conveyor end bearing

BEARINGS.name: SY50TF
BEARINGS.note: 50 mm — most common screw conveyor size

BEARINGS.name: SNL506+22206E
BEARINGS.note: SNL506 housing + 22206E SRB — light drive end 30 mm

BEARINGS.name: SNL510+22210E
BEARINGS.note: SNL510 + 22210E — very common 50 mm drive end

BEARINGS.name: 22206E
BEARINGS.note: 22206E — use with C3 clearance and SNL/SN housing

BEARINGS.name: 2206E-2RS1TN9
BEARINGS.note: Sealed SAB — primary hanger bearing 30 mm; runs in product

BEARINGS.name: 2210E-2RS1TN9
BEARINGS.note: Sealed SAB hanger 50 mm — most common hanger size

BEARINGS.name: 1206ETN9
BEARINGS.note: Open SAB 1206 — re-greasing needed; low-contamination hanger

BEARINGS.name: 32206J
BEARINGS.note: 32206J TRB — combined load inclined conveyor; mount in opposed pair
51106 — axial only; pair with DGBB or SRB for radial load

BEARINGS.name: UCPA205
BEARINGS.note: FAG UCPA205 — 25 mm bore pillow block

BEARINGS.name: 22208-E1.C3
BEARINGS.note: FAG 22208-E1.C3 — C3 clearance standard for conveyors

GBXS.note: Double-worm 2-stage — very high ratio, low output speed
Helical-worm 37 frame — common light-duty screw drive
Helical-bevel K37 — heavy conveyors and mixers
2-stage planetary — good for variable speed VFD

MOTORS.note: IE3 1.5 kW with DC fail-safe brake — inclined conveyors
ATEX II 2G/2D Zone 21 — food dust, fertilizer, pharma

DRIVES.features: Safe torque-off SIL2, full fieldbus suite
DC link choke, EMC class C2
Active front end, unity PF, regen

DRIVES.note: 7.5 kW soft-starter — reduces inrush, no speed control

DRIVES.features: Torque control ramp, pump stop, Modbus

DRIVES.note: 55 kW soft-starter — large conveyors, cost effective

DRIVES.features: Bypass SCR at full speed, integral bypass

DRIVES.note: DOL 11 kW — max typical DOL size (UK)
Star-delta 15 kW — transition shock at switch-over
Star-delta 30 kW — common on process plants

SHAFT_MATS.note: Mild structural steel — very light duty / short feeders only
General structural — light-medium conveyors, standard default
Medium carbon — standard industrial conveyor shaft
Chromoly Q&T — heavy-duty and abrasive service
EN equiv of 4140 — preferred for high abrasion/impact
